pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'Record a payout of $15.00 for Printer Paper Rolls' (task.json line 5)
Task description explicitly states amount is for 'Printer Paper Rolls' (task.json line 5)
Task description explicitly states 'Save/Export the report as a PDF to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\payout_report.pdf' (task.json line 6)
NCH Copper Point of Sale executable is copper.exe, process name is 'copper' (verified from install scripts and running instances)

pi_items.metadata_value: Copper POS supports Payout/Cash Drop transaction types
pi_items.source: Web search of NCH Copper documentation and tutorial found only: Sales transactions, Refund transactions, multiple payment types (cash, credit, cheque). No public documentation mentions Payout or Cash Drop. Execution artifacts show agent searched all menus (Copper, Reports, View, Restaurant, Tools, Help) and sidebar options - no payout feature found. Tools menu contains only: Back Up Data, Restore Data, Refunds, Options.

privileged_info_summary: The task file specifies a petty cash payout of $15.00 for 'Printer Paper Rolls' with output to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\payout_report.pdf'. However, critical issue: NCH Copper Point of Sale version 3.06 does not appear to have a native 'Payout' or 'Cash Drop' transaction feature. Public documentation and user reviews confirm Copper supports Sales, Refunds, and multiple payment methods, but no payout/cash drop capability is documented. Execution artifact from Gemini agent attempting this task shows the agent systematically searched all menus and options in Copper and could not locate any payout recording feature.
